subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-11-05
subcodes.first_line: I speak in Persian and you do not understand... The tongue of the soul is the tongueless tongue... People drink wine and say it is useful. It is not the wine, but the juice of the grape which is useful.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @Shrines and Holy places, @language and the structure of reality
